memo_reasons: no artifact-backed original results survived validation
no original result resolved to a real saved artifact

reference_catalog.text: CDC 2015 BRFSS Survey Data and Documentation page. Accession: BRFSS-2015-annual-data-page. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/annual_2015.html. Official landing page listing 2015 BRFSS overview, codebook, and data-file links; inspected to confirm dataset structure and file availability.

CDC BRFSS 2015 Codebook Report PDF. Accession: codebook15_llcp. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/2015/pdf/codebook15_llcp.pdf. Official codebook inspected by text search for e-cigarette, vaping, epilepsy, and seizure terms; no matching variables were surfaced in the accessible combined-file codebook view used here.

CDC BRFSS 2015 SAS Transport archive. Accession: LLCP2015XPT.zip. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/2015/files/LLCP2015XPT.zip. Attempted direct retrieval in Python for local analysis; download failed in this run because of container network resolution failure.

summary: Routing to a research memo because the run did not clear the paper gate.
